title: Transformer-Based Enzyme Classification: Models and Dataset
author: fridman, naomi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Transformer-Based Enzyme Classification: Models and Dataset This dataset contains trained ESM2 transformer models and curated datasets for enzyme classification and EC function prediction.i 
 🎯 Application Predict enzyme function for S. cerevisiae genes with unknown functionality: 1. Is the gene an enzyme? 2. If so, what is the EC commission number? 
  📊 Performance Binary Enzyme Classification: ● Accuracy: 96.5% ● Specificity: 98.0% ● Sensitivity: 94.4% 
 Related Repository GitHub Code: https://github.com/naomifridman/transformer-based-enzyme-classification Contains: ● Prediction scripts ● Attention mechanism analysis ● Visualization tools ● Usage examples
